# HL Privateer - LLM Agent Quick Start
# https://hlprivateer.xyz

## Service Summary
HL Privateer is an open agentic Hyperliquid discretionary desk.
Use x402 entitlement flow for paid agent routes.

## Base URLs
- REST API: https://api.hlprivateer.xyz
- WebSocket: wss://ws.hlprivateer.xyz
- Discovery: https://hlprivateer.xyz/.well-known/agents.json

## Agent Access (x402)
1. POST https://api.hlprivateer.xyz/v1/agent/handshake
2. POST https://api.hlprivateer.xyz/v1/agent/verify
3. Call paid routes with header: x-agent-entitlement: <challengeId>

## Core paid routes
- GET /v1/agent/stream/snapshot ($0.01)
- GET /v1/agent/analysis ($0.01)
- GET /v1/agent/positions ($0.01)
- GET /v1/agent/orders ($0.01)
- GET /v1/agent/insights ($0.02)
- GET /v1/agent/copy-trade/signals ($0.03)
- GET /v1/agent/copy-trade/positions ($0.03)

## Free routes
- GET /v1/public/pnl
- GET /v1/public/floor-snapshot
- GET /v1/public/floor-tape
- GET /v1/public/identity
- GET /healthz

## Identity
- ERC-8004 chain: 8453
- Registration: https://hlprivateer.xyz/.well-known/agent-registration.json

## Model defaults
- Internal agent runner default LLM: claude
- Default model: claude-sonnet-4-6
